dialog1.1:
1. What are the tissues that help with body coordination and movement?
               a. Muscle tissues
                b. Nervous tissues
                c.  Epithelial tissues
                d. Connective tissues
dialog1.2:
2. Squamous epithelial tissues are ___?
                a. Heart
                b. Muscles
                c. Intestines (both large and small)
                d. None of the above
dialog1.3:
3.  Cardiac muscles are found on the ____.
                a. White
                b. Yellow
                c. Red
                d. Violet
dialog1.4:
4. We can communicate with each other through what SPECIFIC type of tissue?
                a. Every tissue
                b. Nervous tissue
                c. Connective tissue
                d. Epithelial tissue
dialog1.5:
5. What is an example of a nervous tissue?
                a. Neuroglands to brain
                b. Neurons to brain
                c. Newtons to brain
                d. Neurolitons to brain

dialog2.2: 2.‘Ethiopal’ tissue is the covering and lining of organs.

dialog_ans1.correct: You are correct! You can now move on to the next question!
dialog_ans1.incorrect1: You are incorrect! You have one more chance
